title: Tsunderify
description: A mod that makes you sound like a tsundere!
body:
![Tsunderify](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/763a24c7dc8dca9fa11472e5db505eb3c5b95a29.png)

Tsunderify is a highly configurable mod that edits your chat messages to make you sound like a tsundere!
(With emphasis on swear replacement)

Features

  • Replaces swears in your messages with tsundere-style words
  • Makes you stutter at the start of messages and appends tsundere affirmations to the end of messages, with a customizable probability
  • Allows you to set a custom keybind to modify the message, or to always modify everything you send in chat
  • Supports Hypixel's commands (/pc, /gc, etc) as well vanilla commands like /msg, /whisper, etc
  • Transformations adapt to the case of your message
  • Turns you into a true tsundere!

INCOMPATIBLE WITH CHAT PLUS

Demo

![Demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5e094548fa6d867107a2154c6a274cf29130289.gif)
